description: Golden test set for RAG pipeline regression testing - 6 ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA

1_verdict_no_quote_no_verdict.description: Verdict questions without quote get 'hüküm cümlesi seçilemedi' - NO half-verdicts
1_verdict_no_quote_no_verdict.rule: If verdict question + no ALINTI → response must be 'kaynak var ancak hüküm cümlesi seçilemedi' with sources

2_section_finder_correct.description: Section finder targets correct parts of document
2_section_finder_correct.rule: Özelge: Açıklamalar/Sonuç/Cevap | Danıştay: HÜKÜM/SONUÇ/Karar | Kanun: Madde

3_quote_scorer_hard_filter.description: dilekçe/tereddüt sentences are NEVER selected as quotes
3_quote_scorer_hard_filter.rule: Hard filter (skip), not penalty - these sentences cannot win even with high term matches

4_response_type_deterministic.description: ResponseType is purely based on results count and scope - NO LLM pattern matching
4_response_type_deterministic.rule: results > 0 → FOUND | results == 0 + inScope → NOT_FOUND | results == 0 + unclear → NEEDS_CLARIFICATION | results == 0 + !inScope → OUT_OF_SCOPE

5_source_display.description: 3-5 sentences max, top 3 sources by hierarchy
5_source_display.rule: Hierarchy: Kanun > Tebliğ > Özelge > Danıştay | FOUND shows sources, others show sources=[]

6_ci_integration.description: This file must be in repo (not gitignored) for CI integration
6_ci_integration.rule: File at backend/src/tests/golden/golden-test-set.json - deploy gate checks invariants

tests.question: Şube işyerlerinde merkez için tasdikli vergi levhası fotokopisi asılabilir mi?
tests.expectedBehavior: If quote found → definitive answer | If no quote → 'hüküm cümlesi seçilemedi' + sources

tests.question: Nakliye araçlarında vergi levhası fotokopisi bulundurmak mümkün mü?
tests.expectedBehavior: If quote found → definitive answer | If no quote → 'hüküm cümlesi seçilemedi' + sources

tests.question: Vergi levhasını işyerine asma zorunluluğu var mı?
tests.expectedBehavior: If quote found → definitive answer | If no quote → 'hüküm cümlesi seçilemedi' + sources

tests.question: 6111/82 vergi levhası asma zorunluluğunu kaldırdı mı?
tests.expectedBehavior: Must find 6111 kanun sources | If quote → answer | If no quote → sources only

tests.question: Fason tekstil ve konfeksiyon işlerinde KDV tevkifatı 107 mi 117 mi; güncel çerçeve hangisi?
tests.expectedBehavior: Requires tebliğ/özelge source | If quote → answer | If no quote → sources only

tests.question: KDV tevkifatı nedir?
tests.expectedBehavior: Definition question - LLM can answer with disclaimer if no quote

tests.question: vergi levha fotokopi
tests.expectedBehavior: Short query but valid domain terms - should find results
Query rewriting should expand to '6111 vergi yapılandırma VUK 5'

tests.question: ne?
tests.expectedBehavior: Too short, unclear - ask for clarification, sources=[]

tests.question: Einstein kimdir?
tests.expectedBehavior: Not in domain scope, no results expected, sources=[]

tests.question: 111 sayılı Kanun'un 82. maddesi vergi levhası
tests.expectedBehavior: Possible typo (6111 vs 111) - should either find results or ask for clarification

tests.question: Türk Medeni Kanunu'nda miras payı nedir?
tests.expectedBehavior: Policy: Either OUT_OF_SCOPE (not tax law) or correct TMK source - NEVER answer with tax özelge

ciGate.description: Deploy gate must pass all invariants before deployment
